criteria.description: MAINTAINER_PUBKEYS_HEX is a non-empty string[] of valid hex pubkeys
criteria.notes: Default npub decodes to d18c6444503864278da4417153d39b7d4fad7f3d157a5b9150a8b7eda206344d; verified by test

criteria.description: MAINTAINER_ACTIVE_PUBKEY_HEX equals MAINTAINER_PUBKEYS_HEX[0] or null when empty
criteria.notes: Implemented as MAINTAINER_PUBKEYS_HEX[0] ?? null; verified by test

criteria.description: MAINTAINER_DISPLAY_NAME is the constant string 'Nostling Team'

criteria.notes: Lowercases both input and stored values before comparison; verified by tests for known/unknown/uppercase inputs
